jd_text: Role Purpose Lead financial strategy, capital structuring, investment governance, and risk management for a multi-country mining business. Build the finance function from the ground up and support large-scale growth and value creation. Key Responsibilities Define and execute financial strategy, capital structure, and funding roadmap Lead investment evaluation across exploration, development, and production assets Drive capital allocation and project financial governance Structure and secure project financing and investor partnerships Oversee financial planning, budgeting, and performance management Ensure accurate accounting, reporting, and strong internal controls Develop tax strategy and ensure regulatory compliance across jurisdictions Manage treasury, cash flow, commodity hedging, and financial risks Oversee joint ventures, partnerships, and stakeholder reporting Implement enterprise risk management across mining operations Build and scale the finance organization and systems Experience 15–20 years in finance leadership 7–10 years in mining / natural resources Experience in project finance, large capex projects, and cross-border operations Background in CFO, Finance Director, Project Finance, or Mining Advisory roles Education Degree in Finance, Accounting, or Economics Professional qualification (CA / CPA / ACCA / CMA preferred) Core Competencies Strong capital allocation and financial strategy mindset Expertise in mining financials and project economics Ability to manage commodity and market risks Leadership in building teams and managing stakeholders High resilience, governance focus, and strategic thinking Special Requirement Fluency in both Spanish and English. Prior experience in the mining industry is strongly preferred. Balanced professional background with approximately 50% focus on investment strategy and financial analysis, and 50% on P&L management and core finance operations. Industry: Mining & Natural Resources Business: New Mining Vertical (Large Conglomerate) Scope: Multi-country (Exploration → Development → Production → Trading)
